message:

+{

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "backstage: Provide some default values + secrets for the Scaffolder context",
+    "description": "Provide some default values + secrets for the Scaffolder context. Requested by 22+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current backstage setup",
+        "description": "Verify your backstage version and configuration:\n```bash\nnpx backstage-cli info\n```\nThis feature requires a working backstage installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review backstage configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant backstage configuration:\nFollowing on from the closed #6632, it would be great if we could define some default values that can be used in the template manifest (`template.yaml`) and also in `fetch:template`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Provide some default values + secrets for the Scaffolder\u2026",
+        "description": "As an aside here also, and maybe this changes the design a little bit, what if we were able to set default values that you could also use as default values in the `parameters` block. Maybe we don't want to store the default values on the `parameters` namespace then, as it's gonna get super\n```yaml\n# app-config.yaml \n...\nscaffolder:\n  defaultEnvironment:\n    parameters:\n      region: eu-west-1\n    secrets:\n      AWS_ACCESS_KEY: ${AWS_ACCESS_KEY}\n...\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Provide some default values + secrets for the Scaffolder\u2026\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "As an aside here also, and maybe this changes the design a little bit, what if we were able to set default values that you could also use as default values in the `parameters` block.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# app-config.yaml \n...\nscaffolder:\n  defaultEnvironment:\n    parameters:\n      region: eu-west-1\n    secrets:\n      AWS_ACCESS_KEY: ${AWS_ACCESS_KEY}\n...",
+        "apiVersion: scaffolder.backstage.io/v1beta3\nkind: Template\nmetadata:\n  name: v1beta3-demo\n  title: Test Action template\n  description: scaffolder v1beta3 template demo\nspec:\n  owner: backstage/techdocs-core\n  type: service\n\n  parameters:\n    ...\n\n    - title: Choose a location\n      properties:\n        region:\n          title: Region\n          type: string\n    ...\n\n  steps:\n    ...\n\n    - id: template\n      name: Create Repo\n      action: fetch:template\n      input:\n        region:  ${{ parameters.region }}\n    - id: push\n      name: Push to S3\n      action: publish:s3\n      input:\n        region:  ${{ parameters.region }}\n        accessToken: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_TOKEN }}\n    ...\n\n\nAs an aside here also, and maybe this changes the design a little bit, what if we were able to set default"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
